hero.headline:
Your Hotel Knows
More Than Your Staff Remembers
hero.subheadline: Cut seasonal staff onboarding from weeks to days. Every SOP, every procedure, every guest-handling protocol — instantly accessible to every new hire, in their language.

stats.searchTimeLabel: of shift time lost to searching for procedures
stats.knowledgeLossLabel: of hotel knowledge lost with seasonal turnover
stats.trainingCostLabel: average training cost per seasonal employee

socialProof.description: We built PremiumBrain for multilingual teams. Hotels with staff speaking 5+ languages use it to eliminate training bottlenecks and language barriers — from day one.
